name: Dragon and Weed: Origins - Prologue
short_description: In 2053, war is big money. When biotech searchers are abducted, two skilled mercenaries have to extract them. To accomplish their mission, they’ll have to face the n°1 private army. Dive into this world without mercy for a thrilling action story.
detailed_description:
Save 41 % with the Full Access


About the Game

Description
Dragon and Weed: Origins OutBreak is an adult cinematic visual novel series set in a futuristic world where war is big money. It tells the adventures of two former child soldiers.

Season 1: OutBreak, is divided in 3 volumes with 30 to 40 minutes-long episodes (except the pilot). Volume 1 is the first part and has 9 episodes.

The Prologue offers the first episode of the Volume: "New Start" in a stand-alone version.
The episodes 1 to 8 will can be downloaded separately or all at once with the Full Access "Dragon and Weed: Origins OB Dual Edges".



Story
The events starts in 2053, on Earth where a fragile peace is maintained by international political alliances.

Before, it was about 50 years of territorial conflicts, political clashes fed by the growing scarcity of the raw material and orchestrate, behind closed doors, by a powerful conglomerate.

Raised in that chaotic world, Alexander “Dragon” Drayzaai and Lushian “Weed” Nicolier are two childhood friends, that started in the “War Zone” at a young age.

As former members of the military and spiritual program “Professional Assassins”,
Dragon and Weed have developed prized skills.

They are now working for the Common Army of Europe (UNECA), and chain “Die in Piece” missions, missions that no one wants.

Features
  • Wild Action
    Stand-off, explosions gunfights... Dragon and Weed take no break, so will you

  • Unique Visuals
    A cinematic adventure with an unique graphic style and dynamic staging

  • Audio Immersion
    Characters made alive by voice acting wrapped with a captivating and diverse soundtrack

supported_languages:
English*, French, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
